calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-31-2007 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Thomas M. Crowell, ESQ, special appearance for respondent/plaintiff Zuoliang Chen who was not present. Appellant/defendant Jenny Wang not present.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo.

Counsel stated to the court that the case settled. All parties signed a release and settlement agreement. The Court signed an order dismissing the appeal, abandoned by appellant.

JPT Sharon O'Grady, clerk Greg Chuck, not reported (525)

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-28-2006 Continued To Jan-31-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
MINI MINUTES: 9:15AM
Judge Pro Tem Sharon L. O'Grady, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record
APPEARANCES:
respondent Zuoliang Chen, appears in Pro Per; respondent Maura Okita appears through counsel, Winnie Yeung; appellant Jenny Wang appears through counsel, Tara E. Backman.
Cause called for Small Claims appeal. Witnesses are sworn. Judge O'Grady hears a Motion for Reconsideration. The Court grants the motion.

Mr. Chen indicates he would like to proceed with the Small Claims appeal. Counsel for respondents state they want to continue the matter. Ariella Evelyn Perry, previously sworn, testifies as a witness re speaking to Mr. Chen about a continuance. For good cause the Court grants appellant's motion for a continuance. Matter is continued to Jan-31-07, 9:00am. The Court instructs parties to be prepared by Jan-31-07, and to have consolidated the related matter, or disposed of it, by the continued date.
9:30am
No new evidence is introduced or admitted. Court adjourns
